title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at RMZ Corp

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at RMZ Corp
jsonLd.description:
RMZ Corp has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About RMZ Corp:
RMZ Corp is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RMZ Corp!
